problem: My three-digit code is 023. Reckha can't choose a code that is the same as mine in two or more of the three digit-positions, nor that is the same as mine except for switching the positions of two digits (so 320 and 203, for example, are forbidden, but 302 is fine). Reckha can otherwise choose any three-digit code where each digit is in the set $\{0, 1, 2, ..., 9\}$. How many codes are available for Reckha?

classified_questions.question: What is the total number of possible codes without any restrictions?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: How many codes differ from my code in only one digit position?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How did you determine the number of codes that result from transposing two digits?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Why can't Reckha choose my code itself as a valid option?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Can you explain how you arrived at the final number of available codes for Reckha?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Can you think of any other scenarios where similar thinking and steps might be useful in counting and probability problems?
classified_questions.label: e
